result:
All 484 assertions pass. Summary of bug fixes:

| Module | Bug |
|---|---|
| catalog | `product-margin` swapped operands (cost − price → price − cost); `products-by-category` used `product-id` instead of `product-category-id` |
| customers | `tier-discount-pct` had gold/bronze percentages swapped (5/15 → 15/5) |
| inventory | `reorder-needed` used `>` instead of `<` (filtering items above min instead of below) |
| orders | `calculate-tax` had extra `* 2`; `calculate-total` added discount instead of subtracting; `customer-discount-pct` passed customer id instead of tier |
| shipping | `carrier-total-cost` used `carrier-id` instead of `carrier-base-rate`; `zone-surcharge` used `+` instead of `(quot (* cost pct) 100)`; `shipping-cost-for-order` filtered by `"pending"` instead of `order-id` |
| billing | `create-invoice` called `(cust/customer-id)` with no arg; `invoices-for-customer` used `invoice-order-id` instead of `invoice-customer-id`; `mark-invoice-paid` had `issued-at`/status fields swapped in constructor |
| procurement | `lines-for-product` used `purchaseorder-supplier-id` instead of `poline-product-id` |
| promotions | `campaign-active?` used `campaign-id` instead of `campaign-start-date`; `coupon-discount-amount` divided by 10 instead of 100; `customer-eligible?` passed customer id instead of tier |
| employees | `find-employee-by-id` used `employee-hire-date` instead of `employee-id`; `total-commission` wrapped employee-id in `(str ...)` |
| analytics | `revenue-by-period` called `ord/orders-in-period` missing `orders` arg |
| notifications | `create-notification` passed 7 args to 8-field `->Notification` (missing `sent-at`) |
| audit | `audit-order` used `order-customer-id` for entity-id; `audit-shipment` used `shipment-status` for entity-id |
